title: Panic Attack Log
description: Track your panic attacks or episodes of high anxiety to identify patterns and monitor your progress over time.
instructions: Complete this log after each panic attack or period of intense anxiety. Be as specific as possible.

fields.label: When did it happen? (date and approximate time)
Where were you?
fields.placeholder: e.g., at the grocery store, at home, driving

fields.label: What were you doing? Was there a trigger?
fields.placeholder: e.g., standing in checkout line, noticed heart racing after coffee, no clear trigger

fields.label: Peak intensity of panic (1 = mild anxiety, 10 = worst panic ever)
What catastrophic thought did you have?
fields.placeholder: e.g., 'I'm having a heart attack', 'I'm going to faint', 'I'm losing control'

fields.label: What safety behaviors did you use?
fields.placeholder: e.g., left the store, sat down, called someone, took medication

fields.label: What helped, or what would you do differently next time?
fields.placeholder: e.g., breathing helped, reminded myself it would pass, next time I'll try to stay in the situation
